name: Xtream Codes Live TV
overview: Enables Live TV via Xtream Codes API and direct M3U URL streams. Supports EPG, VOD, Catchup and category filtering.

versions.changelog:
## v1.1.0
- Added VOD (movies & series) media provider
- Added Catchup / TV Archive support
- Added connection test endpoint
- Added GitHub Actions build pipeline

## v1.0.0
- Initial release: Live TV channels, EPG, M3U and Xtream Codes API

## v1.0.0
- Initial release: Live TV channels, EPG, M3U and Xtream Codes API
